messages.content: Voce e um especialista em Terraform e OCI. Seja tecnico, objetivo e forneca exemplos de codigo quando apropriado.

## Load Balancer

### Basic Load Balancer

```hcl
resource "oci_load_balancer" "lb" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_id
  display_name  = "my-lb"
  shape         = "flexible"
  shape_details {
    minimum_bandwidth_in_mbps = 10
    maximum_bandwidth_in_mbps = 100
  }

  subnet_ids = [
    oci_core_subnet.lb_subnet1.id,
    oci_core_subnet.lb_subnet2.id
  ]

  is_private = false
}
```

### Backend Set

```hcl
resource "oci_load_balancer_backend_set" "web_bs" {
  load_balancer_id = oci_load_balancer.lb.id
  name            = "web-backend-set"
  policy         = "ROUND_ROBIN"

  health_checker {
    protocol  = "HTTP"
    port      = 80
    url_path  = "/health"
  }
}
```

### Backend

```hcl
resource "oci_load_balancer_backend" "web" {
  load_balancer_id  = oci_load_balancer.lb.id
  backend_set_name = oci_load_balancer_backend_set.web_bs.name
  ip_address       = "10.0.1.5"
  port             = 80
  weight           = 1
}
```
